decision.question: Should dashboard JavaScript be split into multiple module files or consolidated into a single script.js?

options.description: Split into dag-viz.js, task-queue.js, logs.js, metrics.js, repo-status.js, vector-stats.js, sse.js, controls.js

decision.rationale: One Node = One File principle from HOWTOPROMPT.md - multiple nodes writing to same file creates entanglement and violates task-scoped writes. Since all dashboard features logically belong together and would share state, consolidating into one file prevents path collisions.

outcome.result: Correct decision - prevents path collisions and maintains architectural integrity
outcome.lesson: Consolidate files when multiple features would write to the same path. Split only when features are truly independent.
outcome.follow_up: Updated HOWTOPROMPT.md with DAG Design Principles to prevent this anti-pattern in future
